home._OLD_heroSubtitle: D-Secure pomaga organizacijam trajno izbrisati podatke na napravah in v oblakih z zakonodajno skladnimi delovnimi procesi, ki ustrezajo globalnim standardom skladnosti.
home.heroSubtitle: D-Secure je podjetje za upravljanje življenjskega cikla podatkov, specializirano za sanacijo strukturiranih podatkov, sisteme skladne z zakonodajo in operativne okvire za higieno podatkov za podjetja.
home.trustedBy: Zaupajo nam več kot 1000 organizacij po vsem svetu
home.enterpriseTrialSubtitle: Preizkusite vse Enterprise funkcije na eni napravi
home.enterpriseTrialNote: Kreditna kartica ni potrebna • Nakup ni potreben • Poln dostop do funkcij
home.enterpriseFeature1Desc: Dostop do vseh naprednih funkcij, vključno z množičnim brisanjem, prilagojenimi namestitvami in podporo zasebnemu oblaku
home.enterpriseFeature2Desc: Začnite takoj z brisanjem podatkov na podjetniški ravni na svoji testni napravi
home.enterpriseFeature3Desc: Ocenite sposobnosti podjetja brez kakršnih koli obveznosti ali potrebnih podatkov o plačilu
home.complianceSubtitle: V skladu z glavnimi mednarodnimi standardi in predpisi. Izpolnite najstrožje regulatorne zahteve z dokazljivimi, ponovljivimi protokoli čiščenja.
home.verifiableErasureDesc: Nezmotljivi certifikati z digitalnimi podpisi in kriptografsko preverbo
home.auditReadyReportsDesc: Celovita dokumentacija za revizije skladnosti in regulatorne zahteve
home.globalStandardsDesc: Skladnost z mednarodnimi okviri v različnih državah in jurisdikcijah
home.featuresSubtitle: Vse, kar potrebujete za zagotovitev popolne zaščite podatkov
home.feature1Desc: Vojaška uničenja podatkov v skladu z mednarodnimi predpisi, vključno z NIST, DoD 5220.22-M in drugimi
home.feature2Desc: Izbrišite podatke s računalnikov, mobilnih naprav, strežnikov in oblačne shrambe iz ene same platforme
home.feature3Desc: Ustvarite nepoškodljive certifikate in podrobna revizijska poročila za skladnost z regulativami
home.feature4Desc: Upravlja in nadzira operacije brisanja podatkov na daljavo v celotni organizaciji
home.feature5Desc: Ustvarite prilagojene delovne tokove za avtomatizacijo ponavljajočih se nalog in zagotavljanje skladnosti
home.feature6Desc: Prejmite pomoč kadarkoli z našo globalno podporno ekipo, ki je na voljo 24 ur na dan
home.whyChooseSubtitle: Zanesljiva izbira za strokovnjake za varnost podatkov po vsem svetu
home.reason1Desc: Vodilna tehnologija za izbris podatkov z regulirano skladnostjo po vseh glavnih standardih
home.reason2Desc: 24/7 večjezična podpora, pripravljena pomagati po vsem svetu
home.reason3Desc: Zasnovano za upravljanje milijonov naprav z arhitekturo, ki temelji na oblaku
home.reason4Desc: Varnostni standardi vojaškega razreda z mednarodnimi predpisi
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Pridružite se tisočim zadovoljnih strank po vsem svetu
home.testimonial1Quote: D-Secure je spremenil način, kako upravljamo z varnostjo podatkov. Samo poročanje o skladnosti nam je prihranilo nešteto ur.
home.testimonial2Quote: Najboljša rešitev za brisanje podatkov, ki smo jo uporabljali. Enostavna za uvajanje, zanesljiva, ekipa za podporo pa je izjemna.
home.testimonial3Quote: Skladnost z GDPR postala preprosta. Avtomatizirani delovni procesi D-Secure so poenostavili upravljanje celotnega življenjskega cikla naših podatkov.
home.ctaSubtitle: Pridružite se tisočim organizacijam, ki varujejo svoje občutljive informacije z D-Secure
home.ctaNote: Kreditna kartica ni potrebna • 30-dnevno brezplačno preizkusno obdobje
home.industriesSubtitle: Od zdravstvene oskrbe do financ, od vlade do podjetij – naši specializirani delovni procesi zagotavljajo skladnost in varnost v vseh sektorjih.
home.healthcareDesc: Uničenje podatkov v skladu s HIPAA s protokoli specifične sanacije za PHI za medicinske naprave in sisteme EMR.
home.financialDesc: Varnost na ravni bank z upoštevanjem SOX in PCI DSS za trgovinske sisteme in zaščito podatkov strank.
home.governmentDesc: Skladnost z NIST 800-88, DoD 3/7 pass in Common Criteria za zvezne agencije.
home.enterpriseDesc: Celovito brisanje podatkovnih centrov, ki podpira migracije v oblak in upravljanje končnih naprav v večjem obsegu.
home.itadDesc: Popolni delovni procesi dispozicije sredstev z avtomatiziranim procesiranjem za ponovno prodajo, recikliranje in skladnost.
home.serviceProvidersDesc: White-label blagovna znamka z večnajemniškim upravljanjem strank in programi deljenja prihodkov za MSP-je.
home.servicesSubtitle: Vojaška raven varnega brisanja podatkov na vseh platformah - od posameznih naprav do omrežij podjetij in oblačne infrastrukture.
home.driveEraserDesc: Programska oprema za varno brisanje diskov - izbrišite trdi disk, SSD, PC, prenosnik, Mac® in strežnik. Uporabite preko USB in PXE zagona na podprtih napravah.
home.driveEraserPriceNote: Licence po uporabi, ki nikoli ne potečejo
home.fileEraserDesc: Programska oprema za brisanje datotek in map - izbrišite datoteke iz sistemov Windows, Mac in Linux. Prav tako izbrišite strežnike in podatke na računalnikih, povezanih v domeno.
home.fileEraserPriceNote: Več načrtov: Osnovni, Standardni, Oblačni, Mrežni, Pro & Podjetniški
home.trustedTitle: Zaupajo mu organizacije po vsem svetu
home.trustedSubtitle: D-Secure je postal svetovni standard za varno izbrisovanje podatkov, ščiti milijone naprav in služi najbolj varnostno zavzetim organizacijam na svetu.
home.militaryGradeDesc: Metode brisanja skladne z DOD 5220.22-M in NIST 800-88 z validacijo Common Criteria EAL 4+.
home.enterpriseScaleDesc: Obdelajte do 500 strežnikov in 100 naprav na uro z avtomatiziranimi delovnimi tokovi in centraliziranim upravljanjem.
home.globalComplianceDesc: Izpolnite GDPR, HIPAA, SOX in več kot 20 drugih mednarodnih standardov z avtomatiziranim poročanjem o skladnosti.
home.testimonial1: Za naš startup smo potrebovali zanesljivo rešitev za brisanje podatkov. D-Secure je presegla naša pričakovanja s svojo intuitivno zasnovo in celovitimi varnostnimi funkcijami.
home.testimonial2: Kot zgodnji uporabnik sem navdušen nad inovativnim pristopom D-Secure k varnosti podatkov. Ekipa je odzivna, izdelek pa se nenehno izboljšuje.
home.testimonial3: Svež pristop D-Secure k brisanju podatkov je točno tisto, kar trg potrebuje. Preprosto, varno in narejeno v skladu z modernimi standardi skladnosti.

solutions.title: Rešitve
solutions.subtitle: Celovita varnost podatkov za vsako potrebo
solutions.pageSubtitle: Prilagojene rešitve za izbris podatkov za vašo industrijo
solutions.enterpriseSubtitle: Popolno upravljanje življenjskega cikla IT sredstev
solutions.enterpriseDesc: Olajšajte migracije v oblak podjetja, ukinitev IT sredstev in izbris podatkov ob koncu življenjske dobe z zakonito in varno programsko opremo za izbris podatkov. Pridobite skladno brisanje v velikem obsegu za vsa vaša IT podatkovna sredstva v delovni sili, operacijah in podatkovnih centrih.
solutions.enterpriseBenefit1: Programsko temeljen čiščenje podatkov za varno in trajnostno ponovno uporabo
solutions.enterpriseBenefit2: Dokazljivo nepoškodljiv revizijski zapis z digitalno podpisanimi poročili
solutions.enterpriseBenefit3: Združljivo s ServiceNow in običajnimi platformami za upravljanje IT sredstev
solutions.enterpriseBenefit4: Podpira migracijo v oblak, čiščenje podatkovnih centrov in izbris naprav končnih točk
solutions.enterpriseBenefit5: Aktivno brisanje okolja za politike upravljanja podjetniških podatkov
solutions.enterpriseBenefit6: Zmanjšana e-odpadki in povečana donosnost tehnoloških naložb
solutions.enterpriseUseCase1Desc: Varen prenos podatkov med prehodi v oblak infrastrukture
solutions.enterpriseUseCase2Desc: Temeljito brisanje s strežnikov, ločenih diskov in omrežij za shranjevanje
solutions.enterpriseUseCase3Desc: Brisanje podatkov z namiznih računalnikov, prenosnikov, mobilnih naprav in odstranjevalnih medijev
solutions.enterpriseUseCase4Desc: Varen odstranitev ROT podatkov s shranjevalnih medijev
solutions.enterpriseUseCase5Desc: Popolna odstranitev podatkov z naprav odhajajočih zaposlenih
solutions.enterpriseUseCase6Desc: Varnostno upravljanje sproščenih diskov in obsežnih shranjevalnih sistemov
solutions.itadDesc: Zanesljive ITAD partnerske rešitve, ki avtomatizirajo diagnostiko in čiščenje IT sredstev ob koncu življenjske dobe v velikem obsegu. Poenostavite delovne procese, odpravite izpade in maksimirajte dobiček ter hkrati zagotovite zaščito podatkov na prenosnikih, namiznih računalnikih, strežnikih, sproščenih diskih in mobilnih napravah.
solutions.itadBenefit1: Inteligentno usmerjanje poslovanja (IBR) za poenostavljene delovne procese
solutions.itadBenefit2: Obdelava mobilnih naprav v velikem obsegu za ponovno prodajo in recikliranje
solutions.itadBenefit3: Razširjeno upravljanje sredstev, združljivo z AMS/ERP sistemi
solutions.itadBenefit4: Neprizadljiva, pregledna poročila za skladnost s strankami
solutions.itadBenefit5: Dvosmerna komunikacija za zmanjšanje človeških napak in povečanje hitrosti
solutions.itadBenefit6: Podpora za Android, iOS in širok spekter IT sredstev
solutions.itadUseCase1Desc: Čiščenje posameznih sredstev za prodajo ali pripravo na recikliranje
solutions.itadUseCase2Desc: Izpolnjevanje varnostnih in skladnostnih ciljev pri obdelavi prostih diskov
solutions.itadUseCase3Desc: Varnostni postopki upravljanja strežnikov z avtomatiziranimi delovnimi tokovi
solutions.itadUseCase4Desc: Spremljanje in upravljanje diskov, nizov ter velikih sistemov za shranjevanje
solutions.itadUseCase5Desc: Obdelava velikih količin mobilnih naprav za popravilo, prodajo ali recikliranje
solutions.itadUseCase6Desc: Neprekinjena platforma, ki hkrati podpira več zahtev strank
solutions.healthcareSubtitle: Sanacija podatkov v skladu s HIPAA
solutions.healthcareDesc: Specializirane rešitve za zdravstvene organizacije, ki zahtevajo skladnost s HIPAA in zaščito pacientovih podatkov.
solutions.healthcareBenefit1: Uničevanje podatkov v skladu s HIPAA
solutions.healthcareUseCase1Desc: Varnostno brisanje diagnostične in nadzorne opreme
solutions.healthcareUseCase2Desc: Varno ravnanje s podatki med nadgradnjami sistemov
solutions.financialDesc: Ultra-varno čiščenje podatkov za finančne institucije s strožjimi regulatornimi zahtevami
solutions.financialBenefit1: Skladnost s SOX in PCI DSS
solutions.financialUseCase1Desc: Varnostno brisanje sistemov za visokofrekvenčno trgovanje
solutions.financialUseCase2Desc: Čiščenje osebnih identifikacijskih in finančnih podatkov
solutions.financialUseCase3Desc: Pomoč pri skladnosti s SOX, PCI DSS in GDPR
solutions.governmentSubtitle: Vojaški nivo varnosti za javni sektor
solutions.governmentDesc: Varno čiščenje diskov v računalnikih, prenosnikih, Mac napravah in sistemih za shranjevanje podatkov z NIST-testirano programsko opremo. Upoštevajte zvezne in državne predpise, vključno s CMMC 2.0, NIST 800-171 in drugimi vladnimi varnostnimi standardi za popolno zaščito podatkov.
solutions.governmentBenefit1: Skladnost z globalnimi standardi brisanja podatkov NIST 800-88, DoD 3/7 pass
solutions.governmentBenefit2: Pomoč pri skladnosti s FISMA, CMMC 2.0, HIPAA, GLBA regulativami
solutions.governmentBenefit3: Skladno s Common Criteria za raven zaupanja EAL 2
solutions.governmentBenefit4: Hkratno brisanje do 100 diskov in naprav
solutions.governmentBenefit5: Možnosti uvajanja v oblaku in brez povezave (USB zagonski ključ)
solutions.governmentBenefit6: Prilagoditev ISO-ja za standardizacijo brisanja na različnih lokacijah
solutions.governmentBenefit7: Centralizirana konzola z nepoškodljivimi poročili in certifikati
solutions.governmentUseCase1Desc: Varno brisanje strežnikov in shranjevalnih sistemov vlad
solutions.governmentUseCase2Desc: Visoko varno brisanje brez povezave za zaupna okolja
solutions.governmentUseCase3Desc: Skladno uničenje podatkov za občutljive raziskovalne podatke
solutions.governmentUseCase4Desc: Skladnost finančnega sektorja z vladnim nadzorom
solutions.governmentUseCase5Desc: Varno ravnanje s podatki med nadgradnjami in migracijami sistemov
solutions.governmentUseCase6Desc: Sanitarizacija in diagnostika mobilnih naprav po vladnih standardih
solutions.serviceProvidersDesc: Celovite storitve sanitarizacije podatkov, ki jih MSP lahko ponudijo svojim strankam z polnim blagovnim znamčenjem.
solutions.serviceProvidersBenefit2: Upravljanje strank v več najemniškem okolju
solutions.serviceProvidersUseCase1Desc: Ponudite čiščenje podatkov kot upravljano storitev
solutions.caseStudy1Challenge: Regionalna zdravstvena mreža je potrebovala brisanje podatkov v skladu s standardom HIPAA za več kot 25 medicinskih naprav v 12 državah v strogo 3-mesečnem roku za skladnost.
solutions.caseStudy1Solution: Implementirana rešitev D-Secure Healthcare z avtomatiziranimi protokoli specifičnimi za PHI in poročanjem o skladnosti v več regijah za nemoteno uvedbo.
solutions.caseStudy1Results: Dosežena 100% skladnost v 10 tednih, 85% zmanjšanje ročnih procesov, nobenih kršitev podatkov med prehodom
solutions.caseStudy2Challenge: Državna banka je zahtevala čiščenje podatkov v skladu s PCI DSS v podatkovnih centrih, uttagsautomatih in sistemih poslovalnic, ob ohranjanju 24/7 delovanja.
solutions.caseStudy2Solution: Implementiran D-Secure Enterprise z avtomatiziranim upravljanjem življenjskega cikla, možnostjo oddaljenega brisanja in spremljanjem skladnosti v realnem času.
solutions.caseStudy2Results: Nobenega operativnega izpada, priprava na revizijo 95% hitrejša, letna prihranek stroškov 1,8 milijona USD z avtomatizacijo
solutions.caseStudy3Challenge: Ponudnik ITAD, ki mesečno obdeluje 100+ podjetniških naprav, je potreboval razširljivo rešitev za hkratno izpolnjevanje več zahtev skladnosti strank.
solutions.caseStudy3Solution: Implementirana platforma D-Secure ITAD z večstanovanjsko arhitekturo, avtomatizirano generacijo predpisov in zmožnostjo množične obdelave.
solutions.caseStudy3Results: 300% povečanje zmogljivosti obdelave naprav, 99,9% zadovoljstvo strank, avtomatizirano fakturiranje je znižalo administrativne stroške za 60%
solutions.heroSubtitle: Specializirani delovni procesi, okviri skladnosti in orodja za poročanje, zasnovani za edinstvene zahteve vaše industrije. Od skladnosti s HIPAA v zdravstvu do standardov PCI DSS v finančni industriji.
solutions.ecoDesc: Popolna izbrisnost na vseh vrstah naprav in platformah
solutions.industrySub: Izberite svojo panogo, da si ogledate specializirane delovne procese in funkcije skladnosti.
solutions.provenRecordDesc: Več kot desetletje služenja podjetjem po vsem svetu
solutions.support247Desc: Strokovna tehnična podpora 24 ur na dan
solutions.caseStudiesSub: Oglejte si, kako so organizacije v različnih panogah preoblikovale svoje procese izbrisovanja podatkov z D-Secure.
solutions.readyTransform: Pripravljeni spremeniti svoj proces brisanja podatkov?
solutions.readyTransformSub: Pogovorimo se o vaših specifičnih zahtevah in oblikujmo rešitev, ki ustreza vaši industriji in potrebam skladnosti.

driveEraser.pageDescription: Wipe Hard Drive, SSD, PC, Laptop, Mac® & Server. Deploy via USB & PXE Boot on Supported Devices.
driveEraser.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in 4 simple steps — from download to compliance-ready reports
driveEraser.deployDesc: D-Secure Drive Eraser offers the flexibility to wipe drives and devices in both internet-enabled locations and offline facilities.
driveEraser.forRemoteWiping: for remote wiping on Windows endpoints.
driveEraser.complianceSubtitle: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports organizational compliance initiatives by aligning with widely accepted data protection principles and secure erasure best practices
driveEraser.multiArchSubtitle: Native performance across all major CPU architectures and operating systems
driveEraser.x64Desc: Standard 64-bit processors from Intel & AMD used in most desktops, laptops, and servers.
driveEraser.arm64Desc: Modern ARM-based processors for power-efficient computing on mobile, Mac, and servers.
driveEraser.x86Desc: Legacy 32-bit processors for older systems still in enterprise use requiring secure erasure.
driveEraser.featuresSubtitle: Enterprise-grade capabilities designed for security professionals
driveEraser.useCasesSubtitle: Trusted by individuals and enterprises worldwide
driveEraser.faqSubtitle: Everything you need to know about D-Secure Drive Eraser
driveEraser.faq1Q: How many drives can I erase at a time on one machine?
driveEraser.faq1A: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports simultaneous erasure of up to 32 drives per machine, depending on your hardware configuration. For bulk operations, you can use our cloud console to manage multiple machines.
driveEraser.faq2Q: Does the software support Partition Deletion Wipe?
driveEraser.faq2A: Yes, D-Secure supports partition-level erasure in addition to full drive erasure. You can selectively wipe specific partitions while keeping others intact.
driveEraser.faq3A: No, D-Secure is designed with a user-friendly interface. Simply boot from USB, select your drive and erasure standard, and the software handles everything automatically.
driveEraser.faq4Q: Can I sign my file, like XML, jar file with my e-Signature?
driveEraser.faq4A: Yes, D-Secure supports custom digital signatures for reports. You can integrate your organization's PKI for enhanced security.
driveEraser.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure offers native integration with ServiceNow via REST APIs. You can automatically update CMDB records and create incident tickets upon erasure completion.
driveEraser.faq6Q: Can I track separate Inventory for different types of Drives (SSD/HDD, Mobile, etc)?
driveEraser.faq6A: Absolutely. The cloud console provides detailed categorization and filtering by device type, making it easy to track and report on different asset categories.

whatIsBadge.desc: Your gateway to a safe way to trade digital data. The D-Secure Assurance Badge signifies that your organization operates within a trusted ecosystem, enabling secure and reliable data transactions with partners worldwide.

setup.desc: The Assurance Badge is not just about buying a product. It's about implementing a complete data hygiene process that we can audit and verify anytime.

features.freeSpaceWipeDesc: Monthly scheduled sanitization of all free space, eliminating any recoverable data fragments.

questions.q1: What is the D-Secure Assurance Badge?
questions.a1: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is our certification that confirms your organization has implemented proper data hygiene processes. It's not just a certificate - it's our guarantee that you have the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe and secure.
questions.q2: How long does the certification process take?
questions.a2: The typical certification process takes 2-4 weeks, depending on your organization's size and readiness. This includes assessment, implementation support, and final verification.
questions.q3: What are the prerequisites for certification?
questions.a3: Organizations must implement D-Secure data hygiene tools including our automated eraser system, Free Space Wipe. We provide complete guidance on setup and implementation.
questions.a4: We conduct both scheduled and random audits to verify compliance. This includes checking erasure logs, process documentation, and system configurations. Our automated tools make this process seamless and non-intrusive.
questions.a5: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.

questions.a1: Vsaka licenca izdelka je dodeljena glede na število naprav, ki jih izberete. Po potrditvi vašega naročila boste prejeli prijavne podatke za dostop do D-Secure Cloud in potrebne namestitvene datoteke. Skupno število licenc bo ustrezalo številu naprav, izbranih ob nakupu. Ko bo naročilo potrjeno, bodo podrobnosti za dostop do izdelka dostavljene takoj.
questions.q2: Če naročim 1000 licenc, koliko pogonov lahko izbrišem?
questions.a2: Vsaka licenca omogoča brisanje enega pogona. Torej z 1000 licencami lahko pobrišete 1000 pogonov.
questions.a3: Ponujamo BREZPLAČNO dostavo za vsa fizična naročila po vsem svetu. Za digitalno dostavo prejmete takojšnji dostop po e-pošti.
questions.a4: Sprejemamo vse glavne kreditne kartice (Visa, MasterCard, American Express), PayPal, bančna nakazila in naročilnice za podjetniške stranke.
questions.a5: Da! Ponujamo popuste za večja naročila. Prosimo, oddajte zahtevo preko našega obrazca za prilagojene licence, da prejmete osebno ponudbo s prilagojenimi cenami.
questions.a6: Vse licence vključujejo življenjsko tehnično podporo po e-pošti, telefonu in spletnem klepetu. Podjetniške stranke prejemajo prioritetno podporo z dodeljenimi upravitelji računov.
questions.a7: Nudimo stalno podporo, vključno z rednimi posodobitvami programske opreme, tehnično pomočjo, spremljanjem skladnosti in koordinacijo obnovitev. Pomislite na nas kot na stalnega partnerja za higieno podatkov.

manual.aboutDesc1: D-Secure File Eraser is a complete solution to maintain your computer privacy by erasing unwanted information from the computer. Erased data is beyond recovery. D-Secure File Eraser can be used to erase files/folders, Unused space, and System traces.
manual.aboutDesc2: D-Secure File Eraser erases files & folders completely from the hard drive. You can select multiple files/folders at a time for erasure. Once files/folders from the drive are erased using D-Secure File Eraser data can't be recovered back. The software allows you to generate and save the reports of the completed erasure process.
manual.aboutDesc3: In addition, it can erase unused space completely such that all the traces of previously stored data are completely removed. When you delete data from a hard drive, the data content is not deleted entirely, instead the space occupied by the data is marked as unused space and the new data is written on that unused space.
manual.aboutDesc4: D-Secure File Eraser also erases all the system traces. Operating systems store records of all activities such as browsing Internet and opening documents constantly.
manual.aboutDesc5: D-Secure File Eraser has a set of 20+ different erasure algorithms, that are accepted globally, to ensure permanent data deletion. You can choose any of the algorithms for erasure process. The software is menu driven, simple to use with an intuitive interface, and requires no prior technical skill.
manual.featureOSDesc: - Compatible with Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and Linux distributions.
manual.featureEraseFilesDesc: - Option to erase selected files or folders from the hard drive.
manual.featureEraseSpaceDesc: - Option to erase the free space to secure privacy from the selected volumes.
manual.featureScheduleDesc: - Supports schedule erasing tasks to run them automatically at specified periods.
manual.featureReportsDesc: - Option to generate and save 100% secure and tamper-proof erasure reports in various formats such as PDF
manual.featureReportSettingsDesc: - Option to customise the reports before saving the report.
manual.featureSearchReportDesc: - Option to search reports by selecting the appropriate date range or erasure type.
manual.featurePreviewReportDesc: - Option to preview the report before saving.
manual.featureSaveCloudDesc: - Automatic report uploaded to D-Secure Cloud Console.
manual.featureStandards: Supported Erasure Standards and Verification Methods
manual.featureStandardsDesc: - Provides 20+ different erasing algorithms with 3 verification methods to erase the data permanently.
manual.featureSearchEraseDesc: - Option to search specific files using name or extension on the system and erase them using a suitable algorithm.
manual.featureThemesDesc: - Option to switch between light and dark modes.
manual.guideDesc: This user guide contains steps to assist you in various functions of D-Secure File Eraser. Each function is explained in detail, in the corresponding sections. This guide covers the following major topics:
manual.guideNavFeatures: This guide has the following features for easy navigation and understanding:
manual.guideNavTip1: Select a topic from the list of topics given on the left of the navigation pane.
manual.guideNavTip2: There are Notes and Tips in some topics of this guide for better understanding and ease of work.
manual.guideBrowser: This is a web-based guide and requires an active internet connection. You can read this guide with all popular browsers like Chrome, Firefox, Internet Explorer, and Safari. For better viewing experience, it is recommended to use the Chrome browser.
manual.installationIntro: Follow these comprehensive steps to successfully install D-Secure File Eraser on your system:
manual.tabsButtonsTitle: Getting Familiar with Tabs and Buttons
manual.faq1A: D-Secure File Eraser is a professional-grade data erasure tool that permanently deletes files, folders, and traces from your system, making them unrecoverable by any means.
manual.faq2A: No, once data is erased using D-Secure File Eraser with any of the supported algorithms, the data is permanently and irrecoverably destroyed.
manual.faq3A: D-Secure File Eraser supports Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and major Linux distributions.
manual.faq4Q: How many erasure algorithms are available?
manual.faq4A: The software includes 20+ internationally accepted erasure algorithms including DoD 5220.22-M, NIST 800-88, Gutmann, and others.
manual.faq5Q: Can I erase cloud storage data?
manual.faq5A: Yes, D-Secure File Eraser supports Google Drive erasure. You can securely delete files, folders, or entire cloud storage volumes.
manual.faq6A: Yes, tamper-proof PDF reports are automatically generated after each erasure operation. Reports can be saved locally or uploaded to D-Secure Cloud.
manual.faq7A: Yes, the Scheduler feature allows you to set up automated erasure tasks with customizable frequency (once, daily, weekly, monthly) and timing.
manual.faq8Q: Does the software support multiple themes?
manual.faq8A: Yes, you can switch between light and dark mode themes for comfortable viewing.
manual.aboutDSecureDesc: D-Secure is a leading provider of enterprise-grade data erasure solutions, trusted by organizations worldwide for secure, compliant, and certified data destruction.

manual.step1Download: 1. Download the installer from the official D-Secure website:
manual.step1DownloadDesc: web browser. Locate the Downloads section and select the appropriate installer version compatible with your operating system (Windows, macOS, or Linux). Ensure you download from the official source to avoid any security risks or corrupted files. The installer file will be saved to your default
manual.step2Run: 2. Run the installer with administrator privileges:
manual.step2RunDesc: folder and locate the D-Secure File Eraser installer file. Right-click on the installer executable and select "Run as Administrator" to ensure the installation process has the necessary permissions to install system-level components. This step is crucial for proper software integration with your operating system.
manual.step3Follow: 3. Follow the installation wizard and accept the license agreement:
manual.step3FollowDesc: welcome screen. Click "Next" to proceed through the setup process. Carefully read through the End User License Agreement (EULA) to understand the terms and conditions of use. Once reviewed, check the "I accept the agreement" checkbox and click "Next" to continue with the installation.
manual.step4ChooseDesc: the default installation path (typically C:\Program Files\D-Secure File Eraser on Windows) or click "Browse" to choose a custom location on your hard drive. Ensure the selected drive has sufficient free space for the installation, typically requiring at least 100-200 MB of available disk space.
manual.step5CompleteDesc: installation settings on the summary screen to ensure all configurations are correct. Click "Install" to begin the actual installation process. The installer will copy all necessary files to your system, register components, and create shortcuts. Once the progress bar reaches 100%, click "Finish" to complete the installation. supportPage.subject: Zadeva
supportPage.detailedInfo: Prosimo, navedite podrobne informacije o vašem problemu ali vprašanju...

supportPage.subtitle: Kako vam lahko danes pomagamo?

supportPage.faqDesc: Pogosto zastavljena vprašanja naših strank, ki vam lahko pomagajo.
supportPage.knowledgeBaseDesc: Korak za korakom vodnik za varno brisanje podatkov na različnih napravah.
supportPage.getStartedDesc: Naučite se, kako počistiti računalnik, Mac, strežnik in mobilne naprave.
supportPage.helpManualDesc: Popoln vizualni vodič za učenje več o izdelkih D-Secure, namestitvi, pogostih vprašanjih, upravljanju poročil in konfiguraciji naprednih nastavitev.
supportPage.videosDesc: Vodniki po izdelku in video posnetki z navodili.
supportPage.blogDesc: Vpogledi in praktični vodiči o izbrisu podatkov, kibernetski varnosti in upravljanju življenjskega cikla IT-sredstev.
supportPage.assistedSubtitle: Oddajte vstopnico ali nas pokličite za podporna vprašanja
supportPage.writeToUsDesc: Za hiter odgovor na vaše vprašanje nam pišite na e-pošto.
supportPage.raiseTicketDesc: Če imate vprašanja in potrebujete pomoč, prosimo, oddajte zahtevek.
supportPage.callUsDesc: Z veseljem vam bomo pomagali. Tehnična podpora samo v angleščini.
supportPage.interestedFindOut: Vam je zanimivo izvedeti več o naših rešitvah?

resources.title: Blog in središče vpogledov
resources.subtitle: Raziskujte naše najnovejše vpoglede, strokovne perspektive in industrijske trende skozi naše obsežne blog članke. Ostanite obveščeni o najboljših praksah varnosti podatkov in novih tehnologijah.
resources.categoriesDesc: Dostopajte do naše strokovno pripravljene zbirke virov, zasnovane za pomoč pri premagovanju izzivov varnosti podatkov z zanesljivostjo in strokovnostjo.
resources.techDocDesc: Celoviti uporabniški priročniki, dokumentacija za implementacijo in viri za hitro začetek za skrbnike.
resources.blogDesc: Ostanite na tekočem z najnovejšimi trendi, strokovnimi vpogledi in najboljšimi praksami pri čiščenju in varovanju podatkov.
resources.featuredDesc: Naši najbolj priljubljeni in poučni blog članki, ki vas bodo obveščali.
resources.allDesc: Prebrskajte našo celotno zbirko blogov in vpogledov.
resources.noFoundDesc: Poskusite prilagoditi svoje iskalne izraze ali filter kategorij.
resources.item1Desc: Celovit vodič za izvajanje standardov NIST 800-88 Rev. 1 z rešitvami D-Secure.
resources.item2Title: Študija primera čiščenja podatkov v podjetju
resources.item2Desc: Kako je podjetje iz seznama Fortune 500 zmanjšalo čas osvežitve IT za 60 % pri ohranjanju 100-odstotnega skladnosti.
resources.item4Desc: Najboljše prakse za zdravstvene organizacije za vzdrževanje skladnosti s HIPAA med odstranjevanjem naprav.
resources.item5Desc: Korak za korakom vodič za optimizacijo delovnih procesov odlaganja IT sredstev za največjo učinkovitost.
resources.item6Title: Najboljše prakse za izbris podatkov v oblaku
resources.item6Desc: Napredne tehnike za varno čiščenje podatkov v večoblačnih okoljih.
resources.item7Desc: Industrijska analiza zahtev glede varstva podatkov za finančne institucije.
resources.item8Desc: Interaktivno orodje za izračun ROI in izdelavo poslovnega primera za projekte čiščenja podatkov.
resources.item9Desc: Poglobljen vpogled v varnostno arhitekturo in kriptografske implementacije podjetja D-Secure.
resources.item10Desc: Popoln uporabniški priročnik za D-Secure File Eraser. Navodila za namestitev, konfiguracijo in upravljanje za varno brisanje datotek.
resources.item11Title: Varnostno brisanje SSD in NVMe pogonov
resources.item11Desc: Zakaj tradicionalne metode brisanja ne delujejo na SSD-jih. Raziskovanje brisanja na podlagi ukazov, kriptografske sanacije in ravnanje z uravnoteževanjem obrabe.
resources.item12Title: Brisanje proti fizičnemu uničenju: analiza donosnosti naložbe
resources.item12Desc: Primerjalna analiza ohranjanja vrednosti. Kako varno brisanje omogoča ponovno trženje sredstev in skladnost z ESG, v primerjavi s popolno izgubo vrednosti pri fizičnem uničenju.
resources.item13Title: Razbijanje 5 kritičnih zmot o brisanju podatkov
resources.item13Desc: Oblikovanje ni brisanje. Odkrijemo pogoste zmotne predstave, ki organizacije puščajo ranljive za vdore v podatke in regulativne kazni.
resources.item14Title: Upravljanje skladnosti s svetovnimi standardi podatkov
resources.item14Desc: Ključni vodnik za usklajevanje vaših protokolov čiščenja z zahtevami GDPR, HIPAA, SOX in ISO/IEC 27001 za varnost, odporno na revizijo.
resources.item15Title: Najboljša metoda izbrisa podatkov za katerokoli vrsto shranjevalne naprave
resources.item15Desc: Enotna velikost ne ustreza vsem. Naučite se pravilnega standarda brisanja za trde diske, SSD-je in mobilne naprave, da zagotovite skladnost.

pricingPage.subtitle: Professional data erasure solutions trusted by enterprises worldwide. NIST & DoD compliant with lifetime support and instant deployment.
pricingPage.featuresUpdateNote: Features will update based on your selection
pricingPage.specialPricingTitle: Are You An MSP, Academic Institute or Non-Profit Organization?
pricingPage.osCompatibility: OS Compatibility: Windows, Mac, Linux, DOS & Chrome OS | regulated: NIST SP 800-88, DoD 5220.22-M, Common Criteria | Instant Delivery Available
pricingPage.faqQ1: How do I get my License?
pricingPage.faqA1: Each product license is assigned based on the number of devices you choose. You will receive login credentials to access D-Secure Cloud and the necessary installation files after your order is confirmed. The total number of licenses will correspond to the number of devices selected during purchase. Once the order is confirmed, your product access details will be delivered instantly.
pricingPage.faqQ2: If I order 1000 licenses, how many drives can I wipe?
pricingPage.faqA2: Each license allows you to wipe one drive. So with 1000 licenses, you can wipe 1000 drives.
pricingPage.faqA3: We offer FREE shipping for all physical deliveries worldwide. For digital delivery, you receive instant access via email.
pricingPage.faqQ4: What payment methods do you accept?
pricingPage.faqA4: We accept all major credit cards, PayPal, and wire transfers for enterprise orders.
pricingPage.faqA5: Yes! We offer discounts for bulk orders. Please submit a request via our Custom License form to receive a personalized quote with discounted pricing.
pricingPage.faqQ6: What kind of support do you provide?
pricingPage.faqA6: All licenses include lifetime technical support via email, phone, and live chat. Enterprise customers receive priority support with dedicated account managers.
pricingPage.faqA7: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.
pricingPage.worldwideTrusted: worldwide. NIST & DoD compliant with lifetime support and instant deployment.

dataGuardian.heroDesc: We don't just give you a certificate - we give you our assurance that your organization has the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe. This badge represents that you are a trusted, safe, and reliable partner for data security.
dataGuardian.assuranceBadgeDesc: Your gateway to a safe way to trade digital data. The D-Secure Assurance Badge signifies that your organization operates within a trusted ecosystem, enabling secure and reliable data transactions with partners worldwide.
dataGuardian.verifiableErasureDesc: Tamper-proof certificates with digital signatures and cryptographic verification
dataGuardian.auditReadyReportsDesc: Comprehensive documentation for compliance audits and regulatory requirements
dataGuardian.trustedBrandDesc: Build customer confidence with D-Secure certified data handling practices
dataGuardian.dataHygieneSetupDesc: The Assurance Badge is not just about buying a product. It's about implementing a complete data hygiene process that we can audit and verify anytime.
dataGuardian.dSecureEraserDesc: Automated secure deletion that goes beyond standard recycle bin. Every deleted file is securely wiped on schedule.
dataGuardian.freeSpaceWipeDesc: Monthly scheduled sanitization of all free space, eliminating any recoverable data fragments.
dataGuardian.auditReadyLogsDesc: Complete cloud & desktop reporting with timestamps and verification data for compliance.
dataGuardian.recognizedDesc: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is trusted by businesses of all sizes.
dataGuardian.searchCertifiedDesc: Check if an organization has achieved D-Secure Data Hygiene Assurance
dataGuardian.faq1Q: What is the D-Secure Assurance Badge?
dataGuardian.faq1A: The D-Secure Assurance Badge is our certification that confirms your organization has implemented proper data hygiene processes. It's not just a certificate - it's our guarantee that you have the complete setup, processes, and discipline to keep data safe and secure.
dataGuardian.faq2Q: How long does the certification process take?
dataGuardian.faq2A: The typical certification process takes 2-4 weeks, depending on your organization's size and readiness. This includes assessment, implementation support, and final verification.
dataGuardian.faq3Q: What are the prerequisites for certification?
dataGuardian.faq3A: Organizations must implement D-Secure data hygiene tools including our automated eraser system, Free Space Wipe. We provide complete guidance on setup and implementation.
dataGuardian.faq4A: We conduct both scheduled and random audits to verify compliance. This includes checking erasure logs, process documentation, and system configurations. Our automated tools make this process seamless and non-intrusive.
dataGuardian.faq5A: We provide continuous support including regular software updates, technical assistance, compliance monitoring, and renewal coordination. Think of us as your ongoing partner in data hygiene.
dataGuardian.applyForBadgeDesc: Get your organization certified with D-Secure Data Hygiene Assurance

files.title: Files & Folders
files.desc: Permanently delete specific files and directories with military-grade precision.

freeSpace.title: Free Space
freeSpace.desc: Wipe the unused space on your drives to ensure previously deleted data is gone forever.

traces.title: System Traces
traces.desc: Clean up internet history, cookies, and temporary system files that compromise privacy.

algorithms.title: 30+ Erasure Algorithms
algorithms.desc: Includes DOD 5220.22-M, NIST 800-88, and Gutmann to meet any compliance requirement.

scheduling.title: Automated Scheduling
scheduling.desc: Set up recurring erasure tasks to maintain privacy without manual intervention.

reporting.title: Tamper-Proof Reports
reporting.desc: Generate detailed, digitally signed PDF reports for every erasure operation.

cloud.title: Cloud Integration
cloud.desc: Securely erase data from Google Drive and sync reports to D-Secure Cloud Console.

corporate.title: Corporate Data Protection
corporate.desc: Ensure sensitive business documents are destroyed according to company policy.

legal.title: Legal & Compliance
legal.desc: Meet GDPR, HIPAA, and ISO 27001 requirements for systematic data destruction.

individual.title: Individual Privacy
individual.desc: Protect your personal information when selling or disposing of old devices.

faq.q1: Is the erased data really unrecoverable?
faq.a1: Yes. D-Secure File Eraser uses advanced overwriting techniques that make data recovery impossible even with specialized forensic tools.
faq.a2: We provide full support for Windows 10/11, macOS 10.15+, and all major Linux distributions (Ubuntu, Fedora, CentOS, etc.).
faq.q3: Can I erase data from Google Drive?
faq.a3: Yes, our Cloud Eraser feature allows you to securely delete files and folders from your Google Drive with the same high-security standards.
faq.q4: How do I get the erasure reports?
faq.a4: Reports are automatically generated as PDFs after each operation. You can save them locally or upload them to your D-Secure Cloud account.

fileEraserPage.contactSubtitle: Our security experts can help design a data hygiene workflow tailored to your enterprise.

hero.title: Enterprise-Grade Drive Erasure
hero.subtitle: Permanently erase data from hard drives, SSDs, and servers with audit-ready reporting.

eraseTypes.title: What You Can Erase
eraseTypes.subtitle: Comprehensive data destruction capabilities for all storage mediums.

pc.title: Desktops & Laptops
pc.desc: Securely wipe system drives from Windows, Mac, and Linux workstations.

servers.title: Servers & Workstations
servers.desc: High-volume erasure for enterprise-grade server hardware and workstations.

ssds.title: SSDs & NVMe
ssds.desc: Specialized algorithms for flash-based storage to ensure complete data removal.

hdds.title: HDDs & SSHDs
hdds.desc: Traditional magnetic storage sanitization using global standards.

demo.subtitle: Experience D-Secure Drive Eraser in action. Explore the interface and features right here.
demo.description: Interactive product demo: Explore Drive Eraser directly in your browser

step1.title: Download
step1.desc: Get the software from our secure portal.

step2.title: Deploy
step2.desc: Multiple ways to deploy: USB, PXE Boot, or MSI.

step4.title: Save Reports
step4.desc: Store erasure certificates on cloud or locally.

howItWorks.footer: D-Secure Drive Eraser offers the flexibility to wipe drives and devices in both internet-enabled locations and offline facilities.

compliance.title: Compliance Standards
compliance.subtitle: D-Secure Drive Eraser is compliant with major international standards and regulations.

archs.title: Multi-Architecture Support
archs.subtitle: Native support for all major CPU architectures to ensure maximum performance and compatibility.

x64.title: AMD64 / Intel 64
x64.desc: Standard 64-bit processors used in most desktops, laptops, and servers.

arm64.title: ARM64
arm64.desc: Modern ARM-based processors for power-efficient mobile, Mac, and servers.

x86.title: x86 (32-bit)
x86.desc: Legacy 32-bit processors for older systems still in enterprise use.

features.title: Key Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need to ensure complete data protection.

f1.title: Parallel Erasure
f1.desc: Wipe up to 32 drives simultaneously on a single machine.

f2.title: Cloud Console
f2.desc: Centrally manage licenses and reports from any browser.

f3.title: Audit-Ready Reports
f3.desc: Digitally signed certificates for compliance proof.

f4.title: Hardware Detection
f4.desc: Automatic identification of all connected storage devices.

useCases.title: Tailored Use Cases
useCases.subtitle: Specific solutions for diverse enterprise requirements.

u1.title: RAID & Servers
u1.desc: Securely dismantle RAID arrays and wipe server infrastructure.

u2.title: Lease Returns
u2.desc: Clear sensitive data before returning leased equipment.

u3.title: IT Asset Disposal
u3.desc: Ensure data security before recycling or resale.

u4.title: Regulatory Compliance
u4.desc: Meet strict data sanitization mandates globally.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to help you get started with Drive Eraser.
faq.q1: How many drives can I erase at a time?
faq.a1: D-Secure Drive Eraser supports simultaneous erasure of up to 32 drives per machine.
faq.a2: Yes, you can selectively wipe specific partitions or the entire drive.
faq.a3: No, the interface is designed to be intuitive for all skill levels.
faq.q4: Can I sign my reports with e-Signature?
faq.a4: Yes, custom digital signatures are supported for all reports.
faq.a5: Native REST API integration is available for ServiceNow and other CMDBs.
faq.a6: Absolutely. Detailed hardware reports are generated for every session.
faq.a7: 24/7 technical support and regular software updates are included.
